The '''stalking bird''' was a [[Species/Legends|species]] of flightless [[Reptavian/Legends|reptavian]] predator with long neck and legs native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]]. They were known to flush out their prey by walking together in formation, spearing animals as they fled the [[Grass/Legends|grass]] before them. Unfortunately, the species became extinct when Alderaan was destroyed by the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Rebel Force: Hostage]]'' {{Mo}}
